title: selaginella orizabensis
intro: Selaginella orizabensis, also known as the Oaxaca spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Selaginella orizabensis is believed to provide several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried, crushed, and steeped in hot water to create a tea that is said to promote overall well-being.
